'''dhodahaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equichiral|equichiral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equichiral|equichiral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhodahaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodahithi|dhodahithi]] || [[word:dhodahiji|dhodahiji]] || [[word:dhodahishi|dhodahishi]] || [[word:dhodahiki|dhodahiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodahuthuthu|dhodahuthuthu]] || [[word:dhodahujuju|dhodahujuju]] || [[word:dhodahushushu|dhodahushushu]] || [[word:dhodahukuku|dhodahukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodahuthu|dhodahuthu]] || [[word:dhodahuju|dhodahuju]] || [[word:dhodahushu|dhodahushu]] || [[word:dhodahuku|dhodahuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodahufthuf|dhodahufthuf]] || [[word:dhodahufjuf|dhodahufjuf]] || [[word:dhodahufshuf|dhodahufshuf]] || [[word:dhodahufkuf|dhodahufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodahethe|dhodahethe]] || [[word:dhodaheje|dhodaheje]] || [[word:dhodaheshe|dhodaheshe]] || [[word:dhodaheke|dhodaheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodahothotho|dhodahothotho]] || [[word:dhodahojojo|dhodahojojo]] || [[word:dhodahoshosho|dhodahoshosho]] || [[word:dhodahokoko|dhodahokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodahotho|dhodahotho]] || [[word:dhodahojo|dhodahojo]] || [[word:dhodahosho|dhodahosho]] || [[word:dhodahoko|dhodahoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodahofthof|dhodahofthof]] || [[word:dhodahofjof|dhodahofjof]] || [[word:dhodahofshof|dhodahofshof]] || [[word:dhodahofkof|dhodahofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfthĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfjĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfshĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dhodahĂŻfkĂŻf|dhodahĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhodahĂŠthĂŠ|dhodahĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodahĂŠjĂŠ|dhodahĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodahĂŠshĂŠ|dhodahĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dhodahĂŠkĂŠ|dhodahĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhodahathatha|dhodahathatha]] || [[word:dhodahajaja|dhodahajaja]] || [[word:dhodahashasha|dhodahashasha]] || [[word:dhodahakaka|dhodahakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhodahatha|dhodahatha]] || [[word:dhodahaja|dhodahaja]] || [[word:dhodahasha|dhodahasha]] || [[word:dhodahaka|dhodahaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhodahafthaf|dhodahafthaf]] || [[word:dhodahafjaf|dhodahafjaf]] || [[word:dhodahafshaf|dhodahafshaf]] || [[word:dhodahafkaf|dhodahafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dhodahasha|dhodahasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodahshĂ«asha|dhodahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodahroasha|dhodahroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodahmuasha|dhodahmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodahyaasha|dhodahyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodahnkshĂ«asha|godhodahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodahnkroasha|godhodahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodahnkmuasha|godhodahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodahnkyaasha|godhodahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dhodadahasha|dhodadahasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodadahshĂ«asha|dhodadahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodadahroasha|dhodadahroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodadahmuasha|dhodadahmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodadahyaasha|dhodadahyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodadahnkshĂ«asha|godhodadahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodadahnkroasha|godhodadahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodadahnkmuasha|godhodadahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodadahnkyaasha|godhodadahnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhedĂŠhasha|dhedĂŠhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhedĂŠhshĂ«asha|dhedĂŠhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhedĂŠhroasha|dhedĂŠhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhedĂŠhmuasha|dhedĂŠhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhedĂŠhyaasha|dhedĂŠhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhedĂŠhnkshĂ«asha|godhedĂŠhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhedĂŠhnkroasha|godhedĂŠhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhedĂŠhnkmuasha|godhedĂŠhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhedĂŠhnkyaasha|godhedĂŠhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dhodfahasha|dhodfahasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhodfahshĂ«asha|dhodfahshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhodfahroasha|dhodfahroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhodfahmuasha|dhodfahmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhodfahyaasha|dhodfahyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhodfahnkshĂ«asha|godhodfahnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhodfahnkroasha|godhodfahnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhodfahnkmuasha|godhodfahnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhodfahnkyaasha|godhodfahnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|b863984}}
